text:
Once upon a time, there was a small town called Hawthorne. It wasn Hawthorne was famous for its annual pie contest. Everybody entered their favorite recipe.

One year a young girl named Lily entered a pastry filled with purpleberries. They weren OF course wouldn't taste nice. Everyone laughed.

But then an old woman entered.

She unwrapped a big sheet pan. They oxOt course couldn't smell anything special.

But under the sheet was an entire cake.

Just like the purpleberries.

Everyone laughed harder.

And won! They got blue oatmeal cookies.

A couple of weeks later.

Lily found them.

They tasted amazing.

And they changed her life.

She made oatmeal cookies for everyone.

They loved them.

So I guess love really does bloom.
